all.en: Subject, official rollout schedule for our new CRM platform Helios.
all.zh: 主旨：新 CRM 平台 Helios 之正式上線時程。

all.en: After two years of evaluation, we have chosen Helios by Bluepeak Systems.
all.zh: 歷經兩年評估，我們選定 Bluepeak Systems 的 Helios。

all.en: The system replaces our legacy database used since 2014.
all.zh: 本系統將取代自 2014 年沿用至今的舊資料庫。

all.en: Helios offers unified contact records, sales analytics, and marketing automation.
all.zh: Helios 提供統一聯絡人紀錄、銷售分析與行銷自動化。

all.en: It also integrates natively with our finance and support tools.
all.zh: 亦原生整合本公司之財務與客服工具。

all.en: The rollout will follow a phased plan across three regions.
all.zh: 上線將以三個區域分階段進行。

all.en: Phase one begins in North America on June 1, 2026.
all.zh: 第一階段於 2026 年 6 月 1 日於北美啟動。

all.en: Phase two covers Europe, the Middle East, and Africa starting July 15.
all.zh: 第二階段自 7 月 15 日起涵蓋歐洲、中東與非洲。

all.en: Phase three completes the rollout in Asia Pacific on September 1.
all.zh: 第三階段於 9 月 1 日完成亞太區上線。

all.en: Each phase includes four weeks of dedicated training and dual-system operation.
all.zh: 每階段包含四週專屬訓練及新舊系統並行作業。

all.en: Data migration runs in the background using validated mapping templates.
all.zh: 資料移轉於背景以驗證過的對應範本進行。

all.en: Account owners must clean their pipeline records two weeks before go-live.
all.zh: 帳戶負責人須於上線前兩週整理其商機紀錄。

all.en: Duplicate or stale entries will not be migrated to the new system.
all.zh: 重複或過時資料將不會移轉至新系統。

all.en: Training will be delivered through a mix of live and self-paced sessions.
all.zh: 訓練將以現場與自學課程混合方式進行。

all.en: Live sessions take place every Tuesday and Thursday during the rollout.
all.zh: 現場課程於上線期間每週二、週四舉行。

all.en: Self-paced modules can be accessed twenty-four hours a day on Workday Learn.
all.zh: 自學模組於 Workday Learn 全天 24 小時皆可使用。

all.en: Certification is required for anyone with sales or service responsibilities.
all.zh: 凡擔任銷售或服務職務者皆須取得認證。

all.en: Champions in each office will offer hands-on coaching at the desk side.
all.zh: 各辦公室之種子人員將於座位旁提供實作指導。

all.en: A daily standup at nine will address blockers during the first month.
all.zh: 首月將於每日 9 點召開站立會議以排除阻礙。

all.en: After-hours support is available through the Helios chatbot Atlas.
all.zh: 非辦公時間可透過 Helios 聊天機器人 Atlas 取得支援。

all.en: Legacy systems will be archived in read-only mode after each phase completes.
all.zh: 舊系統將於各階段完成後以唯讀模式封存。

all.en: After ninety days, archived data moves to long-term storage.
all.zh: 90 天後，封存資料將轉入長期儲存。

all.en: Please review the detailed FAQ posted on the project Confluence space.
all.zh: 請至專案 Confluence 空間查閱詳細常見問答。

all.en: Direct any concerns to the change management mailbox immediately.
all.zh: 如有任何疑慮，請即刻寄至變革管理信箱。
